name: Los Bukis
description: '''Los Bukis''' (English: the Bukis; ''buki'' meaning "kid" in the [[Purépecha language]]) were a Mexican [[Grupera|grupero]] band. Formed in [[Ario de Rosales]], [[Michoacán]] in 1973, the band's best-known lineup consisted of [[Marco Antonio Solís]], Joel Solís, Roberto Guadarrama, Eusebio "El Chivo" Cortés, Jose "Pepe" Guadarrama, Pedro Sánchez and José Javier Solís.
